title: Board Game Guides
home-subtitle: Quick setup & play references for your favorite tabletop games.
home-disclaimer: These guides are not meant to replace the official rulebook. They're quick-start references to help you set up and play faster.
home-cta: Pick a game from the menu to get started.
home-feature-setup-desc: Get to the table quicker with streamlined setup steps.
home-feature-play-desc: Key rules at a glance so you spend less time flipping pages.
home-feature-scoring-desc: End-of-game scoring broken down into simple checks.
